learnings.key_error: utilities.exceptions.MissingParameter: HF access token is not set. Either pass with `--hf-access-token` or set `HF_ACCESS_TOKEN` environment variable  [tests/model_explainability/lm_eval/upgrade/conftest.py:106]
learnings.root_cause: The 'lmeval_hf_access_token_upgrade' fixture raises MissingParameter because the HuggingFace API access token is not available in the CI environment. The token is required pre-upgrade to create the 'hf-secret' Kubernetes Secret for the LMEval job. Neither the --hf-access-token pytest flag nor the HF_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable was set in this pipeline run.
learnings.recommendation: Add the HuggingFace API token to the Jenkins/Vault CI secrets store and inject it as the HF_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable in the pipeline environment. Alternatively, pass --hf-access-token to the pytest invocation. Verify that the secret binding in the Jenkinsfile is active for the 'rhoai-upgrade' pipeline.

learnings.key_error: TimeoutExpiredError: Timed Out: 30 / Last exception: ResourceNotFoundError: onnx-serverless has no pods  [utilities/infra.py:757 → timeout_sampler/__init__.py:179]
learnings.root_cause: The 'ovms_serverless_inference_service_scope_session' fixture creates an InferenceService 'onnx-serverless' in Serverless/KServe mode but no pods are scheduled within the 30-second pod-creation timeout. ResourceNotFoundError: onnx-serverless has no pods. This indicates the KServe controller or Knative Serving is not processing the ISVC creation — possible causes: Knative controller not running, Istio sidecar injection issue, missing cluster role bindings, or resource quota limits in the 'upgrade-model-server' namespace.
learnings.recommendation: 1) Check Knative Serving controller and activator pod status in the knative-serving namespace. 2) Verify Istio is correctly configured for the upgrade-model-server namespace (sidecar injection, PeerAuthentication). 3) Check resource quotas and LimitRanges in the namespace. 4) Review kserve-controller-manager logs for ISVC reconciliation errors. 5) Ensure the ServingRuntime 'onnx-serverless' template resolves correctly to the expected container image.

learnings.key_error: RuntimeError: No CUDA GPUs are available
learnings.root_cause: KServe pod failed to start due to missing GPU resources on the node
learnings.recommendation: Ensure GPU nodes are available and NVIDIA device plugin is running

learnings.key_error: TypeError: Resource.update() missing 1 required positional argument: 'resource_dict'
learnings.root_cause: Test calls resource.update() with no arguments but the API now requires resource_dict
learnings.recommendation: Update test to pass resource_dict to resource.update()
